label: 街巷烟火版
texture_guidance: 暖光灯串、蒸汽、木桌、旧招牌、真实门店空间和餐具。
scene_prompt: STREET WARM RESTAURANT POSTER. light: warm string lights and shopfront lamps from top background, soft steam glow around food, slight foreground shadow for depth. material: old wood table, ceramic bowls, metal pot, fabric curtain, warm signboard, real restaurant wall texture, steam and oil sheen. color: amber #D89038, honey #F2B85B, brick #8F3A26, dark umber #2B1A12, cream #F6E4C6; palette should feel warm but not red-gold festival. composition: immersive full restaurant scene with foreground table occupying lower 40%, midground diners or shop elements blurred, title in upper 28%; leave a clean reading pocket around text. avoid: no high-density collage, no dark neon nightclub, no fake luxury hotel, no random readable shop signs, no copper hotpot unless requested.
design_lessons: 烟火气来自真实空间层次和暖光蒸汽，不能只靠把背景变黄。
